content: I will write a script to automatically clean and extract *all* the view file snippets logged in the `scratch/` folder that match our document editing keywords, rather than just a hardcoded list. This ensures we don't miss any of the previous implementations.

args.Description: "Updates clean code extraction script to dynamically clean all relevant view logs and append line numbers to filenames."
args.toolAction: "Updating cleaner script to process all relevant view logs"
